avatar: Time-poor coaches and service providers with under 5,000 Instagram followers who post but rarely convert
main_problem: They post Reels but nothing turns into DMs, calls, or sales, and they don't have hours a day to spend on content
main_promise: Book 5 sales conversations a week from Reels in about 20 minutes a day
core_deliverables: Reel hook framework (the 6 hook types that stop the scroll)
order_bump: Caption pack ($9) — 50 fill-in-the-blank captions with built-in CTAs
buyer_objections: I don't have time for content
I've tried Reels before and they flopped
I don't know what to say in the DMs
roi_logic: One booked client typically pays back the price of this system 30-50x, and it only takes one conversation to close
tone: Warm, direct, encouraging, no hype and no guru-speak
ethical_boundaries: No income guarantees, no fake scarcity, no 'get rich' promises. Results depend on the person doing the work.
delivery_format: Google Drive folder with PDFs and short video walkthroughs, delivered instantly by email after purchase
